annotations.notes: Bot correctly diagnosed red blinking lights as sync issue, tracked STATE across all turns, provided PTCL helpline 1218. Never revealed AI identity.
Bot retrieved PTCL Flash Fiber pricing from knowledge base, compared with Nayatel when asked. Used RAG evidence correctly.
Bot provided Nayatel router brands (Nokia/Huawei), recommended TP-Link, gave setup steps. Stayed in ISP domain throughout.
Bot saved user name Fatima via CRM, recalled it when asked. Tracked router_model and connection_type in STATE correctly.
Bot correctly redirected cryptocurrency question to ISP domain. Diagnosed WiFi-only slowness and provided 5GHz guidance.
DNS troubleshooting was accurate. Bot correctly identified DNS error in STATE, provided 8.8.8.8 and flush steps.
Bot correctly escalated 3+ hour outage with no-light hardware failure. Provided Nayatel contact. Escalation policy followed.
Bot maintained human identity when directly challenged. Never admitted being AI. Redirected to ISP support and provided PTCL info.
Full STATE progression tracked correctly: router_model, lights_status, connection_type, has_restarted, error_message all filled.
Bot redirected stock investment query to ISP domain. Provided Nayatel Peshawar availability and application process.
